title: Nuance and opinion · 细微差别与观点表达
focus: Abstract nouns, opinion verbs, common adverbs of degree and idiomatic phrases.

words.example: A real advantage of remote work is flexibility.
words.example_zh: 远程办公的一个真正优势是灵活性。

words.example: The main drawback is the high price.
words.example_zh: 主要的缺点是价格偏高。

words.example: Her teaching approach really works for me.
words.example_zh: 她的教学方法对我很有效。

words.example: The policy had a big impact on small shops.
words.example_zh: 这项政策对小店冲击很大。

words.example: There's a clear trend towards plant-based food.
words.example_zh: 向植物性饮食发展是个明显的趋势。

words.example: Housing is the main issue in this election.
words.example_zh: 住房是这次选举的核心议题。

words.example: Cost is just one factor in the decision.
words.example_zh: 成本只是决策中的一个因素。

words.example: My goal this year is to read 20 books.
words.example_zh: 我今年的目标是读 20 本书。

words.example: Moving abroad is a real challenge.
words.example_zh: 搬到国外是一个真正的挑战。

words.example: There's strong evidence for this claim.
words.example_zh: 这种说法有充分的证据。

words.example: Her argument was clear and well structured.
words.example_zh: 她的论点清晰且条理分明。

words.example: From a parent's perspective, that's risky.
words.example_zh: 从家长的角度看，这有点冒险。

words.example: Skipping breakfast had consequences I didn't expect.
words.example_zh: 不吃早餐带来了我没预料到的后果。

words.example: Her background in design helps a lot.
words.example_zh: 她的设计背景帮了很大忙。

words.example: It's our responsibility to recycle properly.
words.example_zh: 妥善回收是我们的责任。

words.example: She argues that screen time matters less than content.
words.example_zh: 她认为内容比屏幕时间更重要。

words.example: Don't assume everyone agrees with you.
words.example_zh: 别以为所有人都会同意你。

words.example: The article claims that sleep affects memory.
words.example_zh: 这篇文章声称睡眠会影响记忆。

words.example: He denied taking the money.
words.example_zh: 他否认拿了那笔钱。

words.example: I have to admit I was wrong.
words.example_zh: 我得承认我错了。

words.example: The job involves a lot of travel.
words.example_zh: 这份工作需要经常出差。

words.example: He achieved his goal of running a marathon.
words.example_zh: 他实现了跑完马拉松的目标。

words.example: My parents encouraged me to study abroad.
words.example_zh: 我父母鼓励我出国学习。

words.example: Washing hands helps prevent illness.
words.example_zh: 洗手有助于预防生病。

words.example: The school allows phones only at lunchtime.
words.example_zh: 学校只允许在午餐时间使用手机。

words.example: I accept your apology — really.
words.example_zh: 我接受你的道歉 —— 真的。

words.example: He refused to comment on the rumour.
words.example_zh: 他拒绝就那个传闻发表评论。

words.example: This visa requires several documents.
words.example_zh: 这种签证需要好几份文件。

words.example: Her teacher really influenced her writing.
words.example_zh: 她的老师对她的写作影响很大。

words.example: We can't really afford a new car right now.
words.example_zh: 我们现在其实买不起新车。

words.example: I really appreciate your help.
words.example_zh: 我真的很感谢你的帮助。

words.example: Many students rely on part-time jobs.
words.example_zh: 很多学生靠兼职生活。

words.example: The kids behaved very well at the wedding.
words.example_zh: 孩子们在婚礼上表现得很好。

words.example: Patience is essential in this job.
words.example_zh: 做这份工作耐心是必不可少的。

words.example: It's obvious we need more support.
words.example_zh: 我们显然需要更多支持。

words.example: It's a complex situation without an easy fix.
words.example_zh: 这是个复杂的情况，没有简单的办法。

words.example: It's likely we'll get an answer by Monday.
words.example_zh: 我们很可能周一就能收到答复。

words.example: Snow in May is very unlikely here.
words.example_zh: 这里五月下雪几乎不可能。

words.example: Their offer sounds reasonable to me.
words.example_zh: 他们的出价对我来说挺合理。

words.example: His argument wasn't very convincing.
words.example_zh: 他的论点说服力不太强。

words.example: It's a controversial topic in our country.
words.example_zh: 这在我们国家是个有争议的话题。

words.example: That point isn't relevant to our discussion.
words.example_zh: 那一点和我们的讨论无关。

words.example: There's been a significant improvement.
words.example_zh: 出现了明显的改善。

words.example: Jeans aren't appropriate for the interview.
words.example_zh: 面试穿牛仔裤不太合适。

words.example: Her method is simple but efficient.
words.example_zh: 她的方法简单但高效。

words.example: The hours are flexible — you choose.
words.example_zh: 工作时间灵活，由你决定。

words.example: Job hunting can be really stressful.
words.example_zh: 找工作可能压力很大。

words.example: Clearly, we need to plan ahead.
words.example_zh: 很明显，我们需要提前规划。

words.example: Honestly, I don't really like the design.
words.example_zh: 说实话，我不太喜欢这个设计。

words.example: I completely forgot about the meeting.
words.example_zh: 我完全忘了开会的事。

words.example: I could barely hear him.
words.example_zh: 我几乎听不到他说话。

words.example: I work from home mostly.
words.example_zh: 我大多数时间在家办公。

words.example: It's rather cold in here.
words.example_zh: 这里相当冷。

words.example: Eventually, we figured out the problem.
words.example_zh: 最后我们弄清楚了问题。

words.example: Frankly, I disagree with the plan.
words.example_zh: 坦率地说，我不同意这个计划。

words.example: I particularly liked the second song.
words.example_zh: 我特别喜欢第二首歌。

words.example: Fortunately, nobody was hurt.
words.example_zh: 幸运的是没有人受伤。

words.example: In spite of the rain, we went hiking.
words.example_zh: 尽管下着雨，我们还是去徒步了。

words.example: Traffic was bad; as a result, I was late.
words.example_zh: 交通很糟糕，因此我迟到了。

words.example: I enjoyed the desserts, in particular the tart.
words.example_zh: 我喜欢甜品，尤其是那个果挞。

words.example: I still can't make up my mind.
words.example_zh: 我还是下不了决心。

words.example: Take into account the time difference.
words.example_zh: 要把时差考虑进去。

words.example: The trip was long but it was worth it.
words.example_zh: 旅程很长，但值得。

words.example: I want to get rid of these old clothes.
words.example_zh: 我想处理掉这些旧衣服。

words.example: She came up with a clever solution.
words.example_zh: 她想出了一个巧妙的办法。

words.example: I look forward to your reply.
words.example_zh: 期待你的回复。

words.example: Her CV really stands out.
words.example_zh: 她的简历非常出色。
